user.title: Powershop – Sign In
user.description: Enter the email address registered with your Powershop account. A one-time code will be sent to that address.

otp.title: Powershop – Enter Code
otp.description: Enter the sign-in code sent to {email}.

reauth_confirm.title: Powershop – Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session for {email} has expired. Click Submit to send a new sign-in code.

reauth_otp.title: Powershop – Enter Code
reauth_otp.description: Enter the sign-in code sent to {email}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Powershop. Please check your internet connection.
error.email_not_found: That email address was not found on any Powershop account.
error.invalid_otp: The code was incorrect or has expired. Please try again.
error.no_accounts: No Powershop accounts were found for this email.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Powershop account is already configured.
